summary: Completed frontend testing of Daily Projection popup features. All 14 features verified - 12 fully working, 2 conditional features working as designed (Trade Now button and TODAY badge only appear on trading days).
passed_tests: Monthly Table: Each month row has 'Daily View' button ✓ (Found 13 buttons in Year 1)
Daily Projection popup: Opens for each month ✓
Daily Projection: Only shows weekdays (no Saturday/Sunday) ✓ - Sample: Mon, Tue, Wed, Thu, Fri
Daily Projection: Title shows month name ✓ - 'Daily Projection - January 2026'
Current month: Only shows days from today onwards ✓ - Shows 16 remaining trading days
Daily Projection columns: Date, Balance Before, LOT Size, Target Profit, Actual Profit ✓ - All 5 columns present
Actual Profit column: Shows '-' for future dates ✓ - Found 15 entries with '-'
Actual Profit column: Shows 'Pending Trade' for past dates without trade ✓ - Found 1 entry
Monthly Table: Shows 'Trading Days' column with count ✓ - Shows values like '15 days', '20 days', '22 days'
Monthly Table: Shows 'Current Period' accordion for current month ✓
Current Period accordion: Shows '(Current)' badge on month name ✓ - 'January 2026 (Current)'

conditional_features.feature: Actual Profit column: Shows 'Trade Now' button when signal is active for today
conditional_features.note: Button only appears on trading days (weekdays) when active signal exists. Today is Saturday (weekend), so button not visible. Code verified at line 1528-1536.

conditional_features.feature: Trade Now button: Links to /trade (Trade Monitor)
conditional_features.note: onClick={() => window.location.href = '/trade'} - Navigates to Trade Monitor page
Badge only appears on trading days. Today is Saturday (weekend), excluded from Daily Projection.

critical_code_review_comments: All Daily Projection features implemented correctly
isTradingDay() function properly excludes weekends (Sat/Sun) and holidays
isHoliday() function includes common US holidays (New Year, Independence Day, Christmas)
generateDailyProjectionForMonth() correctly starts from today for current month
Actual Profit status logic: 'completed' (has trade), 'active' (today + signal), 'future' (-), 'pending' (Pending Trade)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Projection popup fully tested. Key findings: 1) Popup shows only weekdays (Mon-Fri), excluding weekends and holidays, 2) Current month shows remaining trading days from today, 3) Actual Profit column shows: '-' for future, 'Pending Trade' for past without trade, 'Trade Now' button for today with active signal, actual value for completed trades. Note: Testing done on Saturday (Jan 10, 2026), so TODAY badge and Trade Now button not visible as weekends are excluded.

daily_projection_popup.title: ✓ 'Daily Projection - {Month Name}'
daily_projection_popup.columns: ✓ Date, Balance Before, LOT Size, Target Profit, Actual Profit

actual_profit_column.pending_trade: ✓ Shows 'Pending Trade' for past dates without trade
actual_profit_column.trade_now_button: ✓ Code verified - shows when today + active signal

note: Weekend testing - TODAY badge and Trade Now button not visible as weekends are excluded from trading days
